no: MOD BUG: DGFl.itm referenced by tp2 but not included in mod package. Cannot install. File missing from all known download sources
sum: BG2 quest mod adding the town of Innershade with quests, shops, and NPCs. A fully developed new settlement to explore. Part of the Colours of Infinity series.
